title: trianthema cypseleoides
intro: Trianthema cypseleoides, also known as Puncture Vine or Caltrop, is a perennial plant native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Trianthema cypseleoides include its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or topical creams, although its use should be approached with caution due to the plant's spiny seeds and potential allergic reactions.
